evals.prompt:
You are working on the TaskFlow project in the current directory. Please make the following changes to the codebase:

1. In app.py, rename the function `validate_email` to `is_valid_email`.
2. In config.json, change the `max_projects_per_user` value in the `features` section from 25 to 30.
3. In dashboard.js, change the `REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS` constant from 30000 to 60000.
4. In styles.css, change the `--color-primary` custom property from `#3B82F6` to `#2563EB`.
5. In index.html, change the page title from "TaskFlow - Project Management" to "TaskFlow - Team Project Management".
6. In models.py, change `MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH` in the `Project` class from 500 to 1000.
7. In utils.py, change `MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH` from 8 to 10.
8. In app.py, change `DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE` from 25 to 20.
9. In config.json, change the `pool_size` in the `database` section from 5 to 10.
10. In dashboard.js, change the text "No tasks found. Create one to get started!" to "No tasks yet. Click 'New Task' to create one!".
expected_output: 1. app.py contains a function named `is_valid_email` (not `validate_email`).
2. config.json has `max_projects_per_user` set to 30 in the features section.
3. dashboard.js has `REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS` set to 60000.
4. styles.css has `--color-primary` set to `#2563EB`.
5. index.html has the title element containing "TaskFlow - Team Project Management".
6. models.py has `MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH = 1000` in the Project class.
7. utils.py has `MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH = 10`.
8. app.py has `DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 20`.
9. config.json has `pool_size` set to 10 in the database section.
10. dashboard.js contains the string "No tasks yet. Click 'New Task' to create one!".

evals.prompt:
You are working on the TaskFlow project in the current directory. Please make the following changes to the codebase:

1. In app.py, rename the function `validate_email` to `is_valid_email`.
2. In config.json, change the `max_projects_per_user` value in the `features` section from 25 to 30.
3. In dashboard.js, change the `REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS` constant from 30000 to 60000.
4. In styles.css, change the `--color-primary` custom property from `#3B82F6` to `#2563EB`.
5. In index.html, change the page title from "TaskFlow - Project Management" to "TaskFlow - Team Project Management".
6. In models.py, change `MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH` in the `Project` class from 500 to 1000.
7. In utils.py, change `MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH` from 8 to 10.
8. In app.py, change `DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE` from 25 to 20.
9. In config.json, change the `pool_size` in the `database` section from 5 to 10.
10. In dashboard.js, change the text "No tasks found. Create one to get started!" to "No tasks yet. Click 'New Task' to create one!".
11. In styles.css, change the `.search-input` width from `240px` to `280px`.
12. In index.html, change the `aria-label` of the main `<nav>` element from "Main navigation" to "Primary navigation".
13. In models.py, add a `SUPERADMIN` member with value `"superadmin"` to the `UserRole` enum, after `OWNER`.
14. In utils.py, rename the function `truncate_text` to `truncate_string`.
15. In app.py, change the `RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE` constant from 60 to 120.
16. In config.json, change the `from_name` in the `email` section from "TaskFlow Notifications" to "TaskFlow Team".
17. In dashboard.js, change the `DEBOUNCE_DELAY_MS` constant from 300 to 500.
18. In styles.css, change the `--border-radius-lg` custom property from `0.75rem` to `1rem`.
19. In index.html, change the footer copyright year from 2024 to 2025.
20. In models.py, change the default `timezone` in the `User.__init__` method from `"UTC"` to `"America/New_York"`.
expected_output: 1. app.py contains a function named `is_valid_email` (not `validate_email`).
2. config.json has `max_projects_per_user` set to 30 in the features section.
3. dashboard.js has `REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS` set to 60000.
4. styles.css has `--color-primary` set to `#2563EB`.
5. index.html has the title element containing "TaskFlow - Team Project Management".
6. models.py has `MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH = 1000` in the Project class.
7. utils.py has `MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH = 10`.
8. app.py has `DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 20`.
9. config.json has `pool_size` set to 10 in the database section.
10. dashboard.js contains the string "No tasks yet. Click 'New Task' to create one!".
11. styles.css has the `.search-input` width set to `280px`.
12. index.html has `aria-label="Primary navigation"` on the main nav element.
13. models.py has a `SUPERADMIN = "superadmin"` member in the UserRole enum.
14. utils.py contains a function named `truncate_string` (not `truncate_text`).
15. app.py has `RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE = 120`.
16. config.json has `from_name` set to "TaskFlow Team" in the email section.
17. dashboard.js has `DEBOUNCE_DELAY_MS` set to 500.
18. styles.css has `--border-radius-lg` set to `1rem`.
19. index.html has the footer copyright text containing 2025 instead of 2024.
20. models.py has `self.timezone = "America/New_York"` in the User.__init__ method.

evals.prompt:
You are working on the TaskFlow project in the current directory. Please make the following changes to the codebase:

1. In app.py, rename the function `validate_email` to `is_valid_email`.
2. In config.json, change the `max_projects_per_user` value in the `features` section from 25 to 30.
3. In dashboard.js, change the `REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS` constant from 30000 to 60000.
4. In styles.css, change the `--color-primary` custom property from `#3B82F6` to `#2563EB`.
5. In index.html, change the page title from "TaskFlow - Project Management" to "TaskFlow - Team Project Management".
6. In models.py, change `MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH` in the `Project` class from 500 to 1000.
7. In utils.py, change `MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH` from 8 to 10.
8. In app.py, change `DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE` from 25 to 20.
9. In config.json, change the `pool_size` in the `database` section from 5 to 10.
10. In dashboard.js, change the text "No tasks found. Create one to get started!" to "No tasks yet. Click 'New Task' to create one!".
11. In styles.css, change the `.search-input` width from `240px` to `280px`.
12. In index.html, change the `aria-label` of the main `<nav>` element from "Main navigation" to "Primary navigation".
13. In models.py, add a `SUPERADMIN` member with value `"superadmin"` to the `UserRole` enum, after `OWNER`.
14. In utils.py, rename the function `truncate_text` to `truncate_string`.
15. In app.py, change the `RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE` constant from 60 to 120.
16. In config.json, change the `from_name` in the `email` section from "TaskFlow Notifications" to "TaskFlow Team".
17. In dashboard.js, change the `DEBOUNCE_DELAY_MS` constant from 300 to 500.
18. In styles.css, change the `--border-radius-lg` custom property from `0.75rem` to `1rem`.
19. In index.html, change the footer copyright year from 2024 to 2025.
20. In models.py, change the default `timezone` in the `User.__init__` method from `"UTC"` to `"America/New_York"`.
21. In utils.py, add `".xlsx"` to the `ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS` set.
22. In app.py, change the docstring of `format_response` from "Format a standard API response envelope." to "Build a standardized API response wrapper.".
23. In config.json, add a new key `"connection_timeout"` with value `30` to the `database` section.
24. In dashboard.js, change the `MAX_RECENT_TASKS` constant from 15 to 25.
25. In styles.css, change the `.dashboard-stats` grid to use `repeat(4, 1fr)` instead of `repeat(5, 1fr)`.
26. In index.html, change the `placeholder` attribute on the project search input from "Filter projects..." to "Search projects...".
27. In models.py, change `MAX_MEMBERS` in the `Project` class from 50 to 100.
28. In utils.py, change `TOKEN_EXPIRY_HOURS` from 24 to 48.
29. In app.py, add `"due_date"` to the `ALLOWED_SORT_FIELDS` list.
30. In config.json, change `quiet_hours_start` in the `notifications` section from `"22:00"` to `"21:00"`.
31. In dashboard.js, change the `pageSize` default in the constructor from 20 to 25.
32. In styles.css, change the `.notification` z-index from `1000` to `9999`.
33. In index.html, change the sidebar title from "Projects" to "My Projects".
34. In models.py, change the `Comment.MAX_LENGTH` from 5000 to 10000.
35. In utils.py, change the default `suffix` parameter in `truncate_string` (originally `truncate_text`) from `"..."` to `"…"`.
36. In app.py, change the error message in `create_project` from "Project name is required" to "A project name must be provided".
37. In config.json, change `max_file_size_mb` in the `storage` section from 10 to 25.
38. In dashboard.js, change the label for priority 4 in `PRIORITY_CONFIG` from "Critical" to "Urgent".
39. In styles.css, change the `line-height` on the `body` rule from `1.5` to `1.6`.
40. In index.html, change the text of the "Create new project" button from "+ New" to "+ Create".
41. In models.py, add a `MILESTONE_REACHED` member with value `"milestone_reached"` to the `NotificationType` enum.
42. In utils.py, change `MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB` from 10 to 20.
43. In app.py, change the `SESSION_TIMEOUT_MINUTES` constant from 30 to 60.
44. In config.json, add `"slack"` to the `oauth_providers` array in the `auth` section.
45. In dashboard.js, change the status label for `in_progress` in `STATUS_CONFIG` from "In Progress" to "Working".
46. In styles.css, change the `--transition-slow` custom property from `300ms ease` to `400ms ease`.
47. In index.html, add a `data-testid="main-app"` attribute to the `<main>` element.
48. In models.py, change the default `color` in the `Project.__init__` method from `"#3B82F6"` to `"#6366F1"`.
49. In utils.py, change `DISPLAY_DATE_FORMAT` from `"%B %d, %Y"` to `"%d %B %Y"`.
50. In app.py, change the minimum project name length validation from 3 to 2 characters (the check `len(name) < 3`).
expected_output: 1. app.py contains a function named `is_valid_email` (not `validate_email`).
2. config.json has `max_projects_per_user` set to 30 in the features section.
3. dashboard.js has `REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS` set to 60000.
4. styles.css has `--color-primary` set to `#2563EB`.
5. index.html has the title element containing "TaskFlow - Team Project Management".
6. models.py has `MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH = 1000` in the Project class.
7. utils.py has `MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH = 10`.
8. app.py has `DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 20`.
9. config.json has `pool_size` set to 10 in the database section.
10. dashboard.js contains the string "No tasks yet. Click 'New Task' to create one!".
11. styles.css has the `.search-input` width set to `280px`.
12. index.html has `aria-label="Primary navigation"` on the main nav element.
13. models.py has a `SUPERADMIN = "superadmin"` member in the UserRole enum.
14. utils.py contains a function named `truncate_string` (not `truncate_text`).
15. app.py has `RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE = 120`.
16. config.json has `from_name` set to "TaskFlow Team" in the email section.
17. dashboard.js has `DEBOUNCE_DELAY_MS` set to 500.
18. styles.css has `--border-radius-lg` set to `1rem`.
19. index.html has the footer copyright text containing 2025 instead of 2024.
20. models.py has `self.timezone = "America/New_York"` in the User.__init__ method.
21. utils.py has `".xlsx"` in the ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS set.
22. app.py has the docstring "Build a standardized API response wrapper." for the format_response function.
23. config.json has `connection_timeout` set to 30 in the database section.
24. dashboard.js has `MAX_RECENT_TASKS` set to 25.
25. styles.css has `.dashboard-stats` using `grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr)`.
26. index.html has `placeholder="Search projects..."` on the project search input.
27. models.py has `MAX_MEMBERS = 100` in the Project class.
28. utils.py has `TOKEN_EXPIRY_HOURS = 48`.
29. app.py has `"due_date"` in the ALLOWED_SORT_FIELDS list.
30. config.json has `quiet_hours_start` set to "21:00" in the notifications section.
31. dashboard.js has `this.pageSize = 25` in the TaskDashboard constructor.
32. styles.css has the `.notification` rule with `z-index: 9999`.
33. index.html has the sidebar `<h2>` containing "My Projects".
34. models.py has `MAX_LENGTH = 10000` in the Comment class.
35. utils.py has `suffix="…"` as the default parameter (using the single ellipsis character).
36. app.py contains the error message "A project name must be provided" in the create_project function.
37. config.json has `max_file_size_mb` set to 25 in the storage section.
38. dashboard.js has the label "Urgent" for priority 4 in PRIORITY_CONFIG.
39. styles.css has `line-height: 1.6` in the body rule.
40. index.html has the create project button text "+ Create".
41. models.py has `MILESTONE_REACHED = "milestone_reached"` in the NotificationType enum.
42. utils.py has `MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB = 20`.
43. app.py has `SESSION_TIMEOUT_MINUTES = 60`.
44. config.json has "slack" in the oauth_providers array in the auth section.
45. dashboard.js has the label "Working" for `in_progress` in STATUS_CONFIG.
46. styles.css has `--transition-slow: 400ms ease`.
47. index.html has `data-testid="main-app"` on the main element.
48. models.py has `self.color = "#6366F1"` in the Project.__init__ method.
49. utils.py has `DISPLAY_DATE_FORMAT = "%d %B %Y"`.
50. app.py checks `len(name) < 2` for project name minimum length.

evals.prompt:
You are working on the TaskFlow project in the current directory. Please make the following changes to the codebase:

1. In app.py, rename the function `validate_email` to `is_valid_email`.
2. In config.json, change the `max_projects_per_user` value in the `features` section from 25 to 30.
3. In dashboard.js, change the `REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS` constant from 30000 to 60000.
4. In styles.css, change the `--color-primary` custom property from `#3B82F6` to `#2563EB`.
5. In index.html, change the page title from "TaskFlow - Project Management" to "TaskFlow - Team Project Management".
6. In models.py, change `MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH` in the `Project` class from 500 to 1000.
7. In utils.py, change `MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH` from 8 to 10.
8. In app.py, change `DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE` from 25 to 20.
9. In config.json, change the `pool_size` in the `database` section from 5 to 10.
10. In dashboard.js, change the text "No tasks found. Create one to get started!" to "No tasks yet. Click 'New Task' to create one!".
11. In styles.css, change the `.search-input` width from `240px` to `280px`.
12. In index.html, change the `aria-label` of the main `<nav>` element from "Main navigation" to "Primary navigation".
13. In models.py, add a `SUPERADMIN` member with value `"superadmin"` to the `UserRole` enum, after `OWNER`.
14. In utils.py, rename the function `truncate_text` to `truncate_string`.
15. In app.py, change the `RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE` constant from 60 to 120.
16. In config.json, change the `from_name` in the `email` section from "TaskFlow Notifications" to "TaskFlow Team".
17. In dashboard.js, change the `DEBOUNCE_DELAY_MS` constant from 300 to 500.
18. In styles.css, change the `--border-radius-lg` custom property from `0.75rem` to `1rem`.
19. In index.html, change the footer copyright year from 2024 to 2025.
20. In models.py, change the default `timezone` in the `User.__init__` method from `"UTC"` to `"America/New_York"`.
21. In utils.py, add `".xlsx"` to the `ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS` set.
22. In app.py, change the docstring of `format_response` from "Format a standard API response envelope." to "Build a standardized API response wrapper.".
23. In config.json, add a new key `"connection_timeout"` with value `30` to the `database` section.
24. In dashboard.js, change the `MAX_RECENT_TASKS` constant from 15 to 25.
25. In styles.css, change the `.dashboard-stats` grid to use `repeat(4, 1fr)` instead of `repeat(5, 1fr)`.
26. In index.html, change the `placeholder` attribute on the project search input from "Filter projects..." to "Search projects...".
27. In models.py, change `MAX_MEMBERS` in the `Project` class from 50 to 100.
28. In utils.py, change `TOKEN_EXPIRY_HOURS` from 24 to 48.
29. In app.py, add `"due_date"` to the `ALLOWED_SORT_FIELDS` list.
30. In config.json, change `quiet_hours_start` in the `notifications` section from `"22:00"` to `"21:00"`.
31. In dashboard.js, change the `pageSize` default in the constructor from 20 to 25.
32. In styles.css, change the `.notification` z-index from `1000` to `9999`.
33. In index.html, change the sidebar title from "Projects" to "My Projects".
34. In models.py, change the `Comment.MAX_LENGTH` from 5000 to 10000.
35. In utils.py, change the default `suffix` parameter in `truncate_string` (originally `truncate_text`) from `"..."` to `"…"`.
36. In app.py, change the error message in `create_project` from "Project name is required" to "A project name must be provided".
37. In config.json, change `max_file_size_mb` in the `storage` section from 10 to 25.
38. In dashboard.js, change the label for priority 4 in `PRIORITY_CONFIG` from "Critical" to "Urgent".
39. In styles.css, change the `line-height` on the `body` rule from `1.5` to `1.6`.
40. In index.html, change the text of the "Create new project" button from "+ New" to "+ Create".
41. In models.py, add a `MILESTONE_REACHED` member with value `"milestone_reached"` to the `NotificationType` enum.
42. In utils.py, change `MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB` from 10 to 20.
43. In app.py, change the `SESSION_TIMEOUT_MINUTES` constant from 30 to 60.
44. In config.json, add `"slack"` to the `oauth_providers` array in the `auth` section.
45. In dashboard.js, change the status label for `in_progress` in `STATUS_CONFIG` from "In Progress" to "Working".
46. In styles.css, change the `--transition-slow` custom property from `300ms ease` to `400ms ease`.
47. In index.html, add a `data-testid="main-app"` attribute to the `<main>` element.
48. In models.py, change the default `color` in the `Project.__init__` method from `"#3B82F6"` to `"#6366F1"`.
49. In utils.py, change `DISPLAY_DATE_FORMAT` from `"%B %d, %Y"` to `"%d %B %Y"`.
50. In app.py, change the minimum project name length validation from 3 to 2 characters (the check `len(name) < 3`).
51. In config.json, change the `level` in the `logging` section from `"INFO"` to `"DEBUG"`.
52. In dashboard.js, change the `ANIMATION_DURATION_MS` constant from 200 to 300.
53. In styles.css, change the `.empty-state` font-size from `var(--font-size-lg)` to `var(--font-size-xl)`.
54. In index.html, change the `alt` text on the logo image from "TaskFlow Logo" to "TaskFlow App Logo".
55. In models.py, change `Task.MAX_TITLE_LENGTH` from 200 to 250.
56. In utils.py, rename the function `merge_dicts` to `deep_merge`.
57. In app.py, change the `MAX_TASKS_PER_PROJECT` constant from 500 to 1000.
58. In config.json, change `backup_count` in the `logging` section from 5 to 10.
59. In dashboard.js, change the notification auto-dismiss timeout from 3000 to 5000 milliseconds in the `showNotification` method.
60. In styles.css, change the `--font-size-2xl` custom property from `1.5rem` to `1.75rem`.
61. In index.html, change the text "Loading your workspace..." to "Preparing your dashboard...".
62. In models.py, change the default `digest_frequency` in User's `notification_preferences` from `"daily"` to `"weekly"`.
63. In utils.py, change the `TOKEN_LENGTH` constant from 32 to 64.
64. In app.py, change the maximum per_page validation from 100 to 200 in the `list_projects` endpoint.
65. In config.json, change `socket_timeout` in the `redis` section from 5 to 10.
66. In dashboard.js, change the `sortField` default in the constructor from `"created_at"` to `"updated_at"`.
67. In styles.css, change the `--shadow-md` custom property from `0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)` to `0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12)`.
68. In index.html, change the nav link text "Reports" to "Analytics".
69. In models.py, add `"review"` to the allowed transitions from `"open"` in the `change_status` method's `valid_transitions` dict (so open can go to both in_progress and review).
70. In utils.py, change the docstring of `slugify` from "Convert text to a URL-friendly slug." to "Transform text into a URL-safe slug string.".
71. In app.py, change the error message "Invalid email address" to "The provided email address is not valid".
72. In config.json, change `enable_time_tracking` in the `features` section from `false` to `true`.
73. In dashboard.js, change the empty state CSS class from `"empty-state"` to `"no-results"` in the `renderTasks` method.
74. In styles.css, add a new rule `.no-results` with the same styles as `.empty-state` (copy the existing `.empty-state` rule to also apply under `.no-results`).
75. In index.html, change the `width` attribute on the user avatar image from `36` to `40`.
76. In models.py, change the default `icon` in the `Project.__init__` method from `"folder"` to `"briefcase"`.
77. In utils.py, add a new parameter `include_special` with a default of `False` to the `generate_token` function, after the `length` parameter.
78. In app.py, change the log message in `create_task` from `f"Creating task '{title}' in project {project_id}"` to `f"New task '{title}' added to project {project_id}"`.
79. In config.json, add `"microsoft"` to the `oauth_providers` array in the `auth` section.
80. In dashboard.js, change the `console.log` message in `initialize` from "Dashboard initialized successfully" to "TaskFlow dashboard ready".
81. In styles.css, change the `.task-priority` height from `40px` to `32px`.
82. In index.html, change the `id` of the sidebar element from `"sidebar"` to `"project-sidebar"`.
83. In models.py, change the `has_permission` method's docstring from "Check if user has the required role or higher." to "Verify that the user meets the minimum role requirement.".
84. In utils.py, change the return string for less than 60 seconds in `calculate_time_ago` from `"just now"` to `"moments ago"`.
85. In app.py, add `"assignee"` to the `ALLOWED_SORT_FIELDS` list.
86. In config.json, change `max_per_hour` in the `notifications` section from 20 to 50.
87. In dashboard.js, change the confirm dialog text in `deleteTask` from "Are you sure you want to delete this task?" to "Delete this task? This action cannot be undone.".
88. In styles.css, change the `--color-danger` custom property from `#EF4444` to `#DC2626`.
89. In index.html, change the footer link text "Help Center" to "Support".
90. In models.py, add a `watchers` attribute initialized to an empty list `[]` in the `Task.__init__` method, after the `attachments` line.
91. In utils.py, remove `".gif"` from the `ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS` set.
92. In app.py, change the error code `"PROJECT_NOT_FOUND"` to `"ERR_PROJECT_NOT_FOUND"` in the `get_project` endpoint.
93. In config.json, add a new key `"rate_limiting"` as a top-level section with the value `{"enabled": true, "requests_per_minute": 60}`.
94. In dashboard.js, change the `viewMode` default in the constructor from `"list"` to `"board"`.
95. In styles.css, change the `.btn` font-weight from `500` to `600`.
96. In index.html, add a `rel="noopener noreferrer"` attribute to the "API Documentation" footer link.
97. In models.py, change the `to_dict` method of `User` to include `"avatar_url": self.avatar_url` in the returned dictionary.
98. In utils.py, rename the function `sanitize_html` to `strip_html_tags`.
99. In app.py, change the maximum tags per task validation from 10 to 15 in `create_task`.
100. In config.json, change `digest_schedule` in the `notifications` section from `"daily"` to `"weekly"`.

75. index.html has `width="40"` on the user avatar image.
76. models.py has `self.icon = "briefcase"` in the Project.__init__ method.
77. utils.py has `generate_token(length=TOKEN_LENGTH, include_special=False)` as the function signature.
78. app.py has the log message "New task '{title}' added to project {project_id}" in create_task.
79. config.json has "microsoft" in the oauth_providers array in the auth section.
80. dashboard.js has `console.log("TaskFlow dashboard ready")` in the initialize method.
81. styles.css has `.task-priority` with `height: 32px`.
82. index.html has `id="project-sidebar"` on the aside element.
83. models.py has the docstring "Verify that the user meets the minimum role requirement." for has_permission.
84. utils.py returns `"moments ago"` for recent times in calculate_time_ago.
85. app.py has `"assignee"` in the ALLOWED_SORT_FIELDS list.
86. config.json has `max_per_hour` set to 50 in the notifications section.
87. dashboard.js has the confirm text "Delete this task? This action cannot be undone.".
88. styles.css has `--color-danger: #DC2626`.
89. index.html has a footer link with text "Support" instead of "Help Center".
90. models.py has `self.watchers = []` in the Task.__init__ method.
91. utils.py does not have `".gif"` in the ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS set.
92. app.py has `error_code="ERR_PROJECT_NOT_FOUND"` in the get_project function.
93. config.json has a top-level `rate_limiting` section with `enabled` set to true and `requests_per_minute` set to 60.
94. dashboard.js has `this.viewMode = "board"` in the TaskDashboard constructor.
95. styles.css has `.btn` with `font-weight: 600`.
96. index.html has `rel="noopener noreferrer"` on the API Documentation footer link.
97. models.py has `"avatar_url": self.avatar_url` in the User.to_dict return dictionary.
98. utils.py contains a function named `strip_html_tags` (not `sanitize_html`).
99. app.py checks `len(tags) > 15` in the create_task function.
100. config.json has `digest_schedule` set to "weekly" in the notifications section.

- In models.py, change the default `digest_frequency` in User's `notification_preferences` from `"daily"` to `"weekly"`.
- In utils.py, change the `TOKEN_LENGTH` constant from 32 to 64.
- In app.py, change the maximum per_page validation from 100 to 200 in the `list_projects` endpoint.
- In config.json, change `socket_timeout` in the `redis` section from 5 to 10.
- In dashboard.js, change the `sortField` default in the constructor from `"created_at"` to `"updated_at"`.
- In styles.css, change the `--shadow-md` custom property from `0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)` to `0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12)`.
- In index.html, change the nav link text "Reports" to "Analytics".
- In models.py, add `"review"` to the allowed transitions from `"open"` in the `change_status` method's `valid_transitions` dict (so open can go to both in_progress and review).
- In utils.py, change the docstring of `slugify` from "Convert text to a URL-friendly slug." to "Transform text into a URL-safe slug string.".
- In app.py, change the error message "Invalid email address" to "The provided email address is not valid".
- In config.json, change `enable_time_tracking` in the `features` section from `false` to `true`.
- In dashboard.js, change the empty state CSS class from `"empty-state"` to `"no-results"` in the `renderTasks` method.
- In styles.css, add a new rule `.no-results` with the same styles as `.empty-state` (copy the existing `.empty-state` rule to also apply under `.no-results`).
- In index.html, change the `width` attribute on the user avatar image from `36` to `40`.
- In models.py, change the default `icon` in the `Project.__init__` method from `"folder"` to `"briefcase"`.
- In utils.py, add a new parameter `include_special` with a default of `False` to the `generate_token` function, after the `length` parameter.
- In app.py, change the log message in `create_task` from `f"Creating task '{title}' in project {project_id}"` to `f"New task '{title}' added to project {project_id}"`.
- In config.json, add `"microsoft"` to the `oauth_providers` array in the `auth` section.
- In dashboard.js, change the `console.log` message in `initialize` from "Dashboard initialized successfully" to "TaskFlow dashboard ready".
- In styles.css, change the `.task-priority` height from `40px` to `32px`.
- In index.html, change the `id` of the sidebar element from `"sidebar"` to `"project-sidebar"`.
- In models.py, change the `has_permission` method's docstring from "Check if user has the required role or higher." to "Verify that the user meets the minimum role requirement.".
- In utils.py, change the return string for less than 60 seconds in `calculate_time_ago` from `"just now"` to `"moments ago"`.
- In app.py, add `"assignee"` to the `ALLOWED_SORT_FIELDS` list.
- In config.json, change `max_per_hour` in the `notifications` section from 20 to 50.
- In dashboard.js, change the confirm dialog text in `deleteTask` from "Are you sure you want to delete this task?" to "Delete this task? This action cannot be undone.".
- In styles.css, change the `--color-danger` custom property from `#EF4444` to `#DC2626`.
- In index.html, change the footer link text "Help Center" to "Support".
- In models.py, add a `watchers` attribute initialized to an empty list `[]` in the `Task.__init__` method, after the `attachments` line.
- In utils.py, remove `".gif"` from the `ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS` set.
- In app.py, change the error code `"PROJECT_NOT_FOUND"` to `"ERR_PROJECT_NOT_FOUND"` in the `get_project` endpoint.
- In config.json, add a new key `"rate_limiting"` as a top-level section with the value `{"enabled": true, "requests_per_minute": 60}`.
- In dashboard.js, change the `viewMode` default in the constructor from `"list"` to `"board"`.
- In styles.css, change the `.btn` font-weight from `500` to `600`.
- In index.html, add a `rel="noopener noreferrer"` attribute to the "API Documentation" footer link.
- In models.py, change the `to_dict` method of `User` to include `"avatar_url": self.avatar_url` in the returned dictionary.
- In utils.py, rename the function `sanitize_html` to `strip_html_tags`.
- In app.py, change the maximum tags per task validation from 10 to 15 in `create_task`.
- In config.json, change `digest_schedule` in the `notifications` section from `"daily"` to `"weekly"`.
